package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for gin_context_copy_for_each_item_fanout: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Gin handlers that call c.Copy() once per loop iteration before goroutine fanout.
type CaseGinContextCopyForEachItemFanoutDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGinContextCopyForEachItemFanoutModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGinContextCopyForEachItemFanoutRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGinContextCopyForEachItemFanoutModel
}

type CaseGinContextCopyForEachItemFanoutService struct {
    repo *CaseGinContextCopyForEachItemFanoutRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGinContextCopyForEachItemFanoutAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGinContextCopyForEachItemFanout(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGinContextCopyForEachItemFanoutDTO) error {
    focus := "gin_context_copy_for_each"
    _ = focus
    gin_context_copy_each_item_negative := map[string]int{"gin": 1, "context": 2, "copy": 3, "each": 4, "item": 5, "fanout": 6}
    gin_context_copy_each_item_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    gin_negative_0 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = gin_negative_0
    context_negative_1 := ctx
    _ = context_negative_1
    copy_negative_2 := gin_context_copy_each_item_negative["copy"] + len(input)
    _ = copy_negative_2
    each_negative_3 := gin_context_copy_each_item_negative["each"] + len(input)
    _ = each_negative_3
    for item_negative_4Index, item := range items { gin_context_copy_each_item_negative[item.ID] = item_negative_4Index }
    fanout_negative_5 := gin_context_copy_each_item_negative["fanout"] + len(input)
    _ = fanout_negative_5
    return nil
}
